name: mstack-codex
description: Plugin-first Codex distribution for the MStack multi-agent skill set.

interface.shortDescription: Plugin-first MStack skill bundle for Codex
interface.longDescription: Installs 10 public MStack Codex skills plus embedded coordinator internals as a local plugin while preserving direct skill installs.
defaultPrompt: Install the MStack skill bundle for Codex
Set up MStack as a plugin-first Codex package
Refresh local MStack skills and plugin assets
